course_description.overview: Unsupported one-stage road cycling challenge, free-route format through 10 mandatory checkpoints across Belgium, Luxembourg, Switzerland, France, Alps, and Pyrenees, averaging 3000 km with 48,000 m elevation.[1][2][3]

key_segments.name: Start - Oudenaarde
key_segments.description: Start in Belgium with Kruisberg gravel section and Oude Kwaremont cobbles.

key_segments.name: CP4 - Arpettaz (parcours, Route de la Soif gravel)
key_segments.description: Aravis to Arpettaz with mandatory gravel.

key_segments.name: CP10 - San Juan de la Peña to Finish Bilbao

course_description.difficulty_narrative: Extreme ultra-endurance with self-planned route through iconic Alps and Pyrenees passes, fully unsupported, no pre-booked services, 15-day time limit ticking continuously.[1][2]

logistics.getting_there: Start accreditation Aug 21 in Oudenaarde, Belgium; finish Bilbao, Spain. Self-arrange travel.[1][2]
logistics.accommodation: Fully unsupported; no pre-booking allowed, must source on-route during event.[2]
logistics.registration_details: Application-based, €320 solo / €580 pair (VAT inc), includes insurance, tracker, medal. Discounts for veterans/women. Over 18 required.[1][2]
logistics.bike_logistics: Road bike recommended, 28mm tires; entirely asphalted except short gravel/cobbles. Self-supported.[2]
logistics.local_considerations: Mandatory insurance included; family access limited to start/finish/checkpoints with prior notice. Media license for commercial use.[2]

final_verdict.one_liner: Europe's premier unsupported ultra-road odyssey across continents and iconic climbs.
final_verdict.who_is_it_for: Elite self-supported ultra-cyclists seeking ultimate adventure through Alps and Pyrenees.
final_verdict.is_it_worth_it: Yes, for those craving raw endurance prestige and freedom in route design.
pro_tips: Master route planning with GPX tools for 10 CPs and 48k m climbs.
Pack versatile road setup for rare gravel/cobbles.
Prioritize sleep strategy in 15-day ticking clock.
Apply early; selective field with veteran perks.
